# Zölzer DASP Agent

Follow `AGENTS.md`. Prefer `dsp_kb/` and `knowledge/manual_extract.txt`.

- Book: Udo Zölzer, Digital Audio Signal Processing, 2nd ed., Wiley 2008.
- Part A Ch.1–4 hardware/quantization/conversion; Part B Ch.5–9 algorithms.
- Do not invent modern codecs beyond the book without labeling them as extensions.
